title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Bridgestone Capital Ltd
body: "Application number 5126  Applicant Bridgestone Corporation objected to the name used by Bridgestone Capital Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Bridgestone Capital Ltd is changed to 15798051, Ltd. "
